overview: The Masters of Social Science (MSS) in Journalism, Media and Communication is a two-year program divided into six semesters, each consisting of a duration of four months. The total credits for the program are 54. The courses are a combination of both theoretical and practical learning.
waiver_info: Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
eligibility: Graduating with minimum BSS/BS/Com/BSc or equivalent degree are eligible to apply with minimum CGPA 2.50 or equivalent.
facilities: Comprehensive Curriculum: A well-structured & exclusive two-year masters program covering essential aspects of journalism, media, and communication.
Qualified Faculty: Experienced PhD degree holder and industry professional instructors dedicated to providing quality education and mentorship.
Interactive Learning: Courses designed to integrate theoretical knowledge with practical skills for engaging learning experiences.
Admission Accessibility: Eligibility for graduates holding various bachelor's degrees, ensuring inclusivity.
Thesis/ Project/Industry Attachment/Comprehensive: Opportunities for practical application and research through a dedicated 4-credit-hour component.
Flexibility: Choice-based options in certain semesters, allowing students to tailor learning experiences to their interests.
Career Preparation: Equipping students with skills and knowledge essential for thriving in diverse media and communication contexts.
contact: Admission Helpline: 880 961 7001512, admission@daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, www.daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka-1216
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr / Summer: May-Aug / Fall: Sep-Dec
